main.description: Register an endpoint to be notified of writes via com.atproto.space.notifyWrite. On a space host, subscribes to writes for all repos in the space. On a repo host with a repo specified, subscribes to that repo. Requires a space credential.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

endpoint.description: The service endpoint that will receive notifyWrite calls.

repo.description: When calling a repo host, subscribe to this specific repo rather than the whole space.

expiresAt.description: When the registration expires. May be later than the expiration of the presented space credential.
